title: If You Build It They Will Come
section_path: If You Build It They Will Come
section_path_text: If You Build It They Will Come
summary:
Weekly Tanker Market Report
In recent years we have seen a remarkable increase in VLCC flows out of the US Gulf (USG) as overall US crude production increased thanks to the shale revolution. Traditionally, most US crude cargoes are loaded on Aframax and Suezmax vessels but increasingly, these flows are being sized up onto larger VLCCs. However, an important issue with the USG VLCC market is the limited options to load a full cargo of 2 million barrels at terminal.
